title: Stronger Growth in Steel Production Outside of China
section_path: Stronger Growth in Steel Production Outside of China
section_path_text: Stronger Growth in Steel Production Outside of China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, global steel production totaled approximately 157.9 million tons in March. This is up month-on-month by 4.5 million tons (3%) but is down year-on-year by 900,000 tons (-1%). Steel production outside of China totaled approximately 73.5 million tons.
